<<interface>>
Abstract Factory

ISBN: String[0..1] {id}
name: String
subject: String
overview: String
publisher: String
publicationDate: Date
lang: String

barcode: String[0..1] {id}
tag: RFID[0..1] {id}
^ISBN: String[0..1]
^subject: String
title: String {redefines name}
isReferenceOnly: Boolean = false
lang: Language {redefines lang}
numberOfPages: Integer
format: Format
borrowed: Date
/loadPeriod: Integer {readOnly}
/dueDate: Date {readonly}
/isOverdure: Boolean = false
class Library Domain Model
